## What
Add structural test `test_preplanning_natural_language_prompt` to `tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh` and RED marker to `.test-index`.

Test verifies that the preplanning probe section uses natural-language phrasing. Per behavioral testing standard Rule 5 — structural boundary only.

Suggested assertions (structural, not content):
- The clinical 'true/false, default: true' prompt text is NO LONGER present in the preplanning probe section (negative grep)
- The preplanning probe section contains a boolean normalization instruction (positive grep for 'yes' or 'normalize' near preplanning section)
